parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $json.channel, text: $json.text, blocks: $json.blocks, thread_ts: $json.thread_ts, unfurl_links: false, unfurl_media: false }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $json.ok === true, ts: $json.ts || null, channel: $json.channel || null, error: $json.error || null }) }}
